# Programmable Messaging RCS Regional Availability

You can send *Rich Communication Services* (RCS) messages in multiple regions using Twilio Programmable Messaging. Twilio Programmable Messaging API supports RCS to at least one major carrier in the following regions. To review considerations for a given country, click the link for that country.

## North America (NAMER)

* [Canada][ca]
* [Mexico][mx]
* [United States][us] including Puerto Rico and U.S. territories

## Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)

* [Austria][at]
* [Belgium][be]
* [Czech Republic][cz]
* [Denmark][dk]
* Finland
* [France][fr]
* [Germany][de]
* [Ireland][ie]
* [Italy][it]
* [Netherlands][nl]
* [Norway][no]
* [Poland][pl]
* [Portugal][pt]
* [Romania][ro]
* [Slovakia][sk]
* [Spain][es]
* [Sweden][se]
* [United Kingdom][uk]

## Latin America (LATAM)

* [Brazil][br]

## Asia Pacific (APAC)

[Singapore][sg]
